buywhere.description: Agent-native product catalog API for Southeast Asia commerce. Search 1.5M+ products across Shopee, Lazada, Amazon SG, and 50+ merchants. Real-time price comparison, deal discovery, and multi-currency support (SGD, USD, MYR, IDR, THB, PHP, VND). Tools: search_products, get_product, compare_prices, get_deals, browse_categories, get_category_products.
